items.name: Rusty Key
items.description: A key so corroded it might unlock a door or give you tetanus. Possibly both.

items.name: Glowing Mushroom
items.description: A bioluminescent fungus that pulses with an eerie blue light. Nutritional value: questionable. Aesthetic value: undeniable.

items.name: Sturdy Stick
items.description: A stick. Not just any stick -- this one has character. And splinters.

items.name: Makeshift Torch
items.description: A stick with a glowing mushroom wedged on top. It provides light and existential dread in equal measure.

items.name: Mysterious Bottle
items.description: A small glass bottle containing something that's either medicine, poison, or an ancient smoothie recipe. The label has long since decomposed.

items.name: Cave Crystal Shard
items.description: A small shard of crystal that hums with faint magical resonance. It is warm to the touch and deeply unimpressive.

items.name: Telescope Lens
items.description: A cracked but functional lens. It magnifies your view and your insecurities.

items.name: Town Notice
items.description: An official notice declaring the kingdom 'temporarily inconvenienced' by a petrification curse. Bureaucratic understatement at its finest.

items.name: Bridge Toll Coin
items.description: A coin so old the face on it has worn into a vague smudge. Still legal tender, apparently.

items.name: Royal Seal
items.description: A heavy wax seal stamp bearing the royal crest: a disgruntled badger wearing a crown. Historically accurate, unfortunately.

items.name: Blank Royal Decree
items.description: A sheet of parchment so official-looking it could probably govern a small nation. Which is sort of the point.

items.name: Sealed Royal Decree
items.description: A forged royal document bearing the royal crest. Your mother would be so disappointed.

items.name: Dried Sage
items.description: A bundle of sage so old it has more in common with dust than herbs. Still technically aromatic.

items.name: Empty Chalice
items.description: A dented silver chalice. Once held wine for kings. Now holds your hopes, which are equally intoxicating.

items.name: Water-Filled Chalice
items.description: A chalice filled with clear well water. It looks almost regal again. Almost.

items.name: Spirit Brew
items.description: A chalice of sage-infused water that glows faintly. It smells like a retirement home for ghosts.

items.name: Rat Trap
items.description: A rusty spring-loaded contraption that has seen better days. So have the rats, to be fair.

items.name: Flour Sack
items.description: A sack of flour that the rats didn't get to. Miracles do happen.

items.name: Skeleton Key
items.description: A key shaped from actual bone. Whether human or animal is a question best left unasked.

items.name: Castle Map
items.description: A map of the kingdom showing routes to the Screaming Caverns. Includes a helpful 'You are here' arrow pointing at nothing.
